title: United States
about: State outlines come from the US Census cartographic boundary files (via US Atlas TopoJSON), projected with an Albers USA projection so Alaska and Hawaii sit as insets rather than at their true scale and position.

The five inhabited territories (Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands, Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, American Samoa) and the District of Columbia are shown for learning but are not part of the 50-state quiz. Outlines are simplified for display.
